race.comment: SIRLEAF (7) turned things around quickly when she ploughed through the heavy conditions to get up in a tight finish over 1400m at this track. Sharp weight drop and good gate can offset this stronger contest. Go close. CHEVAL CHIC (2) winkers go on today and should handle the rise in trip. Kept finding with the 60kg for a close-up sixth over 1200m at this track. Leading contender. NAUGHTY NURSE (6) is well drawn for this after she drifted back from a sticky gate for a disappointing last over 1400m at Newcastle. Worth noting winning apprentice William Stanley goes aboard. Expected to bounce back quickly. MEDDLESOME (11) returns from a let-up. Rewarded for her consistency as fav with a narrow win at Inverell over 1400m. Tricky gate today and must be kept safe.
